title: Everything You Need to Know About Selling Digital Products from Africa
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling digital products from Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, or Bangladesh is possible with crypto-native infrastructure that has no geographic restrictions.

content.text: You're a digital creator in Ghana, bursting with innovative ideas and a hunger to share them with the world. But time and again, you're blocked by the limitations of payment gateways like PayPal and Stripe. These platforms claim to provide a seamless experience, but the harsh reality is that they often discriminate against creators from countries like Ghana, leaving you with a broken pipeline and a dwindling bank account. You're not alone in this struggle. There are millions of creators around the world who face similar challenges, and it's time to break free from these shackles. With Unchained Commerce, you can finally sell your digital products on your own terms, without the need for intermediaries or restrictive payment systems.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

At its core, Unchained Commerce is a suite of tools designed to help digital creators like you break free from the shackles of restrictive payment gateways. It's not just a payment solution; it's a comprehensive platform that enables you to sell your digital products, manage your orders, and receive payments in a secure and seamless manner. By leveraging blockchain technology, Unchained Commerce eliminates the need for intermediaries, ensuring that you get paid directly and instantly. This not only saves you time and money but also provides an added layer of security, as your transactions are recorded on a public ledger that's transparent and tamper-proof.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The magic happens through the combination of blockchain technology and a cutting-edge payment processor called NOWPayments. When you purchase a digital product using Unchained Commerce, the transaction is recorded on a blockchain network, which ensures that it's secure, transparent, and tamper-proof. The payment processor then facilitates the transfer of funds directly to your wallet, eliminating the need for intermediaries and ensuring that you receive your payment instantly. This process is automated, eliminating the need for manual intervention and reducing the risk of errors or delays.
Who This Is Built For and Why

Unchained Commerce is built specifically for digital creators like you who face challenges in receiving payments through traditional payment gateways. Whether you're a writer, artist, musician, or coder, this platform provides a level playing field, enabling you to sell your digital products on your own terms and connect with your audience directly. By leveraging blockchain technology, Unchained Commerce empowers creators to take control of their business, reduce their expenses, and increase their revenue. It's not just a payment solution; it's a business enabler that helps you achieve your goals and realize your potential.
By leveraging blockchain technology, you can eliminate the need for intermediaries and reduce your expenses.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The Full Stack Bundle, which includes the Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard, is the backbone of Unchained Commerce. The Core Shop Engine is the backend that manages your orders, delivers your digital products, and verifies payments. The Web3 Wallet Connect is the frontend that enables customers to pay using their preferred wallet or cryptocurrency. The Admin Dashboard provides real-time analytics, transaction logs, and order management, giving you a comprehensive view of your business. Together, these components work seamlessly to provide a secure, efficient, and transparent payment experience.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you've learned about Unchained Commerce and its components, it's time to take action. Start by signing up for the Full Stack Bundle, which includes the Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard. Configure your store, set up your payment options, and start selling your digital products. Engage with your audience, build your brand, and grow your business. With Unchained Commerce, you have the power to take control of your business and achieve your goals. Don't let payment gateways hold you back; break free and thrive with Unchained Commerce.
How can creators in Africa sell digital products internationally?

Yes, you can sell your digital products from Ghana without using PayPal or Stripe. Unchained Commerce provides a comprehensive platform that enables you to receive payments directly and instantly, using blockchain technology and a cutting-edge payment processor. You can sign up for the Full Stack Bundle today and start selling your digital products on your own terms.
Unchained Commerce provides a level playing field for digital creators like you, enabling you to sell your products on your own terms.

The benefits of Unchained Commerce don't stop at payment solutions. By leveraging blockchain technology, you can also connect with your audience directly, build your brand, and grow your business. To get started with Unchained Commerce, follow these steps: Create a digital product that you're proud to sell. Set up your store using the Core Shop Engine.
